1110000001110111 1000111001100011 0 -> sum: 0110111011011010, cout: 1
1001010101110000 1001001001000010 1 -> sum: 0010011110110011, cout: 1

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
